scripts.android: cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug -x installDebug && cd .. && METRO_PORT=${METRO_PORT:-$(sed -n 's/^METRO_PORT=//p' .env.local 2>/dev/null | tr -d '"\r' | head -1)} && DEVICE=${ANDROID_SERIAL:-$(adb devices 2>&1 | sed -n '2p' | awk '{print $1}')} && adb -s "$DEVICE" install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && adb -s "$DEVICE" reverse tcp:8081 tcp:${METRO_PORT:-8081} && adb -s "$DEVICE" shell am start -n com.wahyutrip.sekar/.MainActivity
scripts.android:all: cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug -x installDebug && cd .. && export METRO_PORT=${METRO_PORT:-$(sed -n 's/^METRO_PORT=//p' .env.local 2>/dev/null | tr -d '"\r' | head -1)} && adb devices 2>&1 | grep -w device | grep -v 'List of' | awk '{print $1}' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'adb -s {} install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && adb -s {} reverse tcp:8081 tcp:${METRO_PORT:-8081} && adb -s {} shell am start -n com.wahyutrip.sekar/.MainActivity'
scripts.android:clean: rm -rf android/.gradle android/app/.cxx android/app/build android/build node_modules/.cache node_modules/*/android/.cxx node_modules/@*/*/android/.cxx && npm run android
scripts.build:android:staging: node scripts/decrypt-env.js .env.staging && (cd android && ENVFILE=.env.runtime ./gradlew clean assembleRelease); rm -f .env.runtime
scripts.build:android:production: node scripts/decrypt-env.js .env.production && (cd android && ENVFILE=.env.runtime ./gradlew clean assembleRelease); rm -f .env.runtime
scripts.build:aab:production: node scripts/decrypt-env.js .env.production && (cd android && ENVFILE=.env.runtime ./gradlew clean bundleRelease); rm -f .env.runtime
scripts.build:release:staging: node scripts/decrypt-env.js .env.staging && (cd android && ENVFILE=.env.runtime ./gradlew clean assembleRelease bundleRelease); rm -f .env.runtime
scripts.build:release:staging:ci: node scripts/decrypt-env.js .env.staging && (cd android && ENVFILE=.env.runtime ./gradlew assembleRelease bundleRelease); rm -f .env.runtime
